privileged_info_summary: The task uses Matomo Tag Manager, a real open-source plugin for Matomo Analytics. Two key technical specifications are verified: (1) PageView is the correct trigger type identifier in Matomo Tag Manager, as confirmed by the GitHub source code showing the PageViewTrigger class; (2) CustomHtml is a valid tag type that allows custom HTML and JavaScript code to be executed, confirmed by official documentation and source code references. The other metadata items (container name 'MainTracker', trigger name 'AllPages', tag name 'ConversionPixel', specific tag content, and scoring weights) are arbitrary configuration values chosen by the task creator and have no external data source to verify against.
